# Science of Logic

*[Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md) · 1812 · *Wissenschaft der Logik**

The logical heart of the system (1812–1816): [Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md) sets out the self-movement of the categories of thought, from being to the concept, each generating the next through its own contradiction. It is here that he analyzes being, nothing and becoming, and the double sense of Aufhebung.
